title: Mirroring ROWS to a new board
excerpt:

posts.author: WaxConsultingGroup (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board that will require external viewing so that means I plan to create a separate board just for the external view.

However, I need to synch certain rows of data into the new board. I know we can mirror columns, but how can I synch & mirror exact rows from boards into another board?? I’m not moving the item, literally placing a mirror version of the item row and having it synch up in real time, as its updated in the main board.

Can anyone recommend a solution?

On permissions, can I give external permissions only to a specific VIEW? I thought external permissions extended to any views on the board you share externally?

THanks!!

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml:
Click the three-dot menu by the view name and select Share. Then copy the shareable link and share it.
I tested this, and only the view shared is visible via the shareable link.
